title: Umami Comfort Buns
description: These diabetic-friendly comfort buns are a light and comforting Greek dish featuring a delightful umami flavor profile that pairs perfectly with savory snacks or breakfasts.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the egg whites and vanilla extract until fully combined.
Gradually add the flour while continuing to mix until just combined. The mixture should be slightly crumbly but not dry.
Divide the dough into 8 equal parts and shape them into small round buns using your hands or a rolling pin.
Place each bun on a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for approximately 12-15 minutes or until golden brown. Do not overbake as they can become dry.
Let the buns cool slightly before serving. They are best served warm.
